final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card for children about the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, key bullet points listed and labeled on the side, and a cartoon story scene as the main body
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国, presented in child-friendly cartoon form
Scene/backdrop: must include a 赤壁 river battle scene rendered as cartoon illustration
Lighting/mood: needs a lively and engaging children's-book atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, child-friendly direction — exact colors are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the main title; must include key story bullet points labeled alongside the illustration (content: 曹操南下 / 孙刘联军 / 火烧赤壁 / 曹军大败)
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; title must be clearly legible; bullet points must be visually separated and annotated beside the main illustration
Avoid:
